title: Agent Specialists & Segregation
learning_outcomes: Explain specialist profiles and role configuration rules.

content_sections.title: Specialist Roles and Boundaries
content_sections.content: Specialization reduces task complexity. By configuring distinct prompts, we define agent roles (e.g. Coder, Tester, Analyst). The **Coder** prompt directs the model to focus strictly on code implementation, while the **Tester** prompt instructs it to design test cases. Prompt boundaries prevent agents from executing actions outside their scope, ensuring clean separation of concerns.
